Legal Disclaimer
Last updated: May 2026
1. About IQ Unlock
IQ Unlock is a family financial learning tool designed to help children develop responsible money habits through goal-setting, quiz-based rewards, and parental oversight. It is not a licensed financial institution, bank, or payment processor.
2. Not Financial Advice
Nothing within the IQ Unlock application, website, or related communications constitutes financial, investment, or legal advice. All financial decisions remain the sole responsibility of the parent or guardian.
3. Parental Responsibility
By using IQ Unlock, parents and guardians accept full responsibility for monitoring their child's use of the platform and for any financial transactions initiated through third-party services linked via the app.
4. AI-Generated Content
Quiz questions are generated using artificial intelligence and may occasionally contain errors or inaccuracies. Parents are encouraged to review quiz content. IQ Unlock is not responsible for educational outcomes.
5. Privacy & Data
IQ Unlock collects only the data necessary to operate the service. We do not sell personal information. Children's data is handled in accordance with applicable privacy laws including COPPA. See our full Privacy Policy for details.
6. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, IQ Unlock and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
7. Changes to This Disclaimer
We may update this disclaimer from time to time. Continued use of IQ Unlock after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.
Questions? Contact us
